analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Cancel Subscription\n\nBody: Hi there,  I would like to cancel my subscription to Zoca. Can you assist me please?    Sincerely,  Mary Delaney-Shaw  Owner  MDS Beauty

messages.body: Request Closed
Hi Mary, This is Joe, we regret the whole inconvenience and we have  already processed the refund as requested. It should reflect in your account soon

Hi Mary,  I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused. Please rest assured that I am personally looking into this matter and will ensure the refund is processed at the earliest. I know how frustrating it …
Hello, Have i been refunded yet? Or should i just let the legal team at Mastercard contact you guys instead?
I dont even know who i’m speaking with from Zoca. Can you introduce yourself?
What does the ‘needful’ mean?

Out of respect i gave over 30 days notice to cancel my subscription with Zoca. This payment should not have been processed. I would appreciate this transaction to be cancelled immediately as i gave due notice.
Not sure what the delay is. Did you refund me?
We are processing the needful as soon as possible
Kindly allow us 3-4 business days, it's with our finance team. It will be processed as soon as possible
Also would be great if we can get on a call as per your convenience
Hi Mary,  Really sorry for the delay and the frustration you had to go through with the payments. Please give us some time, we will do the needful as soon as possible
I’ve already been in touch with my bank. I will give you guys a few hours to rectify before i report fraud to Mastercard.
When can i expect to see a refund?
This is not acceptable

Hi Mary,   Thank you for reaching out to Zoca. We sincerely apologize for the concern this has caused. We understand how important this is and are looking into it immediately. Please allow us some time to verify the deta…
Monisha, I cancelled my Zoca subscription last month why am i being charged for this month? Can someone call me asap!
Thanks Monisha

Hello Mary! Merry Christmas!🎄🎁  Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with love, laughter, and all the things that bring you happiness.   Thank you for your trust and support throughout the year. It’s been a pleasur…
Hello Mary,  Hope you’re doing well :)
Monisha, I’m waiting for our meeting at 9am
Good morning, Just waiting for google link for meeting
Mary Delaney-Shaw and Monisha Arunkumar Tuesday, 2 Dec · 7:30 – 8 PM Google Meet joining info Video call link: https://meet.google.com/qtt-zexp-irc https://tel.meet/qtt-zexp-irc?pin=1573064193154
Good morning Monisha, I would like to cancel my subscription to Zoca please.
Yes i can do a meeting at 11:00am tomorrow
Please go ahead and schedule the meeting through my calendly :)
Hello Mary,  Hope you’re doing well :)   What happened? Can we set up a meeting tomorrow to discuss in detail please?
Subject: Cancel Subscription\n\nBody: Hi there,  I would like to cancel my subscription to Zoca. Can you assist me please?    Sincerely,  Mary Delaney-Shaw  Owner  MDS Beauty
Hello Mary,  Hope you’re doing well!  I was extremely sick and was unavailable. However, I’m back to work today.
Hey Mary,  Sorry I was held up with meetings. I’ve shared the keywords before Zoca as well in the same mail thread.
I’m sharing the keywords report to you now
Monisha, The list of keywords i asked for was to include pre and post hiring you guys. Is the list you sent the current list of keywords?
Apologies for the delay  in response. Monisha was out on sick leave for the last 2 days  We''ll share this report across tomorrow   Thanks for being patient!
Hi Monisha, Any sign of that keyword report?
It’s complete for you now

Hi Mary,  I wanted to follow up and check whether you’ve had a chance to complete the feedback form I emailed you a couple of days ago. If not, could you please take a few minutes to fill it out today? I need to provide …
Microblading, facials and lash lift
Do you have a link?
https://meet.google.com/zpc-osqr-xsx?authuser=0
Thank you so much, Mary :)
Can you resend?
Hello Mary,  I’m in the meeting room. Would you be joining?
Nevermind i think i have it
I rescheduled our meeting for Wednesday at 9am. Talk to you then
Perfect! Thank you so much, Mary :)

Hello Mary,  Hope you’re doing well!  We’ll face to reschedule our meeting to some other day this week, as I’m not working today.  Thank you for understanding. You may check my availability and schedule a meet :)
Okay ill take a look
Things are going fine.
I have a meeting scheduled with you for Monday 11/10 i’ll speak to you then
Awesome! That works :)   Talk to you Monday
How’s everything going at your end?
Thank you so much, Mary :)

Hi Mary,  Hope you’re doing great! :)  Just a quick reminder - I recently sent you a feedback form to your email (look for the subject line “We’d love your quick feedback on your ZOCA experience”)  We’d be thrilled to he…
Hi Monisha, Yes i got it. I’ll get to it over the weekend thanks!
I saw you got a new lead come in! Hannah. Did you reach out to her?
Perfect then :)
Hey Mary,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I check this and it seems to be working fine. Can you retry now?
Seems to be working now
Hi Monisha, Is Zoca.com down? I’ve been trying to get some analytics for the past couple of days now…

Subject: Re: Mary, ready to bring in more local clients?\n\nBody: Hi Mary Just checking in, your Discovery Agent is helping clients find you organically, but there’s still an opportunity to reach even more potential clie…
Alright :)
The promo is listed now
You can go to the “services” section on the Zoca app and modify it from there
Yes i went through the add on services. I’ll keep it in mind for now
Hello Mary,  I’m back to work today. I hope you’re doing well :)   Let me get the Google post part checked with the team right away.
Also, did you go through the add-on services email that I sent you?
Let me know if you still need any help

Hi Monisha, I know you’re off but just wanyed to mention while it’s on my mind. I don’t see the 10% promo on my google listing and also can you remove “2 sessions “ from Microblading service. It’s not necessary to mentio…

Hi, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major festival here in India, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able to sch…
Great! 😊
You’re welcome :)
Hi Monisha, Yes i got the email. Thanks
Hey Mary,  I’ve sent you an email with complete pricing details of the add-on services that we provide. Please do go through it and let me know :)
Yes will do
Hey Mary,  Thanks for sharing this. Just ensure that it’s added on your booking platform as well.
Thanks for your time this morning Monisha. Attached is the Fall Promo
Hi Monisha, Do you have a meeting link?
Hey Mary,  Here’s the link - http://meet.google.com/afo-icaf-fkn

Hey Mary,  We’ll discuss in details during our meeting. Here’s my calendly link - https://calendly.com/monisha-a-zoca/zoca-call?utm_content=3473&utm_term=59328  You may schedule it anytime this week apart from today :)
Okay talk to you Wednesday at 11:30am
Perfect! Talk soon :)
Hey Mary,  How are you doing?   Just checking in to see how things are going for you :)
Hi Monisha, Inquiries have slowed down a bit. Overall, seems to be going okay. Can you send me a calender link so i can book a meeting with you soon?
